learning_roadmap.title: Hardware & Microcontroller Basics: {first_gap}
learning_roadmap.description: Understand circuit fundamentals, sensors, and microcontrollers while coding basic controls for {first_gap}.

learning_roadmap.title: Embedded Code & Sensor Logic: {second_gap}
learning_roadmap.description: Program real-time sensor loops and mechanical actuation using {second_gap}.

learning_roadmap.title: Physical Prototype Demo
learning_roadmap.description: Assemble a working hardware demo or simulation model with schematics and video demonstration.

ai_exposure_breakdown.ai_role: AI checks pin configurations, suggests resistor values, and drafts PCB layouts.
ai_exposure_breakdown.human_role: Human verifies electrical safety, physical constraints, and component sourcing.

ai_exposure_breakdown.ai_role: AI generates C++/Python driver boilerplate and sensor parsing logic.
ai_exposure_breakdown.human_role: Human manages real-time hardware interrupts, timing precision, and physical debugging.

ai_exposure_breakdown.ai_role: AI analyzes sensor telemetry logs to detect mechanical friction or drift.
ai_exposure_breakdown.human_role: Human performs hands-on soldering, assembly, mechanical alignment, and safety checks.

evolution_timeline.title: Robotics / Hardware Hobbyist
evolution_timeline.description: Build basic sensor-driven prototypes with Arduino/Raspberry Pi and write fundamental control scripts.

evolution_timeline.title: Embedded Systems Engineer
evolution_timeline.description: Design custom PCBs, program real-time operating systems (RTOS), and integrate wireless IoT modules.

evolution_timeline.title: Robotics Systems Architect
evolution_timeline.description: Lead autonomous mechanical systems engineering, integrating computer vision, ROS, and physical hardware.

future_self.headline: Future Robotics / Hardware Innovator
future_self.narrative: {name} can bridge the digital and physical worlds by building smart physical devices. Hands-on hardware tinkering combined with modern AI algorithms will make your skills irreplaceable.
future_resume_highlights: Built a sensor-controlled physical prototype related to {title}.
Designed circuit schematics and programmed real-time hardware feedback loops.
Published a complete technical documentation README with mechanical drawings.

risk_heatmap.description: Physical assembly and real-world hardware integration are highly resistant to pure digital automation.
Physics and electronics laws do not change, though microcontroller platforms evolve over time.
Requires hardware components and practical prototyping, naturally reducing entry-level crowd competition.
Physical systems operating near humans demand strict safety verification and physical reliability.
